name: California Rarebit
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add the white wine and heat until it begins to simmer gently.
3. Stir in 2 cups of the cheese, allowing it to melt completely.
4. Add a small amount of the cheese mixture to the beaten egg, then return the egg mixture back into the cheese.
5. Cook and stir for about 1 minute.
6. Add the Worcestershire sauce and basil, keeping the sauce warm.
7. In a separate pan, sauté the mushrooms in the remaining butter until just tender. Sprinkle with garlic powder and remove from heat.
8. Arrange toast points or triangles on individual heatproof plates.
9. Spoon the warm sauce over the toast.
10. Top with the sautéed mushrooms.
11. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
12. Broil until bubbly.
